summary: Replaced language-specific verification examples in task-executor.md and error-fixer.md with single just build && just test command
keyDecisions: Replaced three language examples (Go/Node/Python) with single just build && just test
Updated prose from Run complete verification suite for your project: to Run just build && just test:

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: grep -c go test|npm test|pytest|npm run build plugins/forge/agents/task-executor.md = 0
grep -c go test|npm test|pytest|npm run build plugins/forge/agents/error-fixer.md = 0
grep -c just build && just test plugins/forge/agents/task-executor.md >= 1
grep -c just build && just test plugins/forge/agents/error-fixer.md >= 1
